---
title: "Talks"
subtitle: "Selected talks, lectures and event pages"
---

This page is intended as a clean landing page for slides, recordings and event links. Add links as they become available.

## Selected talks

- **Tail-calibrated quantile treatment effects for extreme event attribution**  
  Talk on causal inference and high-quantile estimation for climate/weather extremes.

- **Predicting multivariate extremes in environmental sciences**  
  Guest lecture / GLEN-related event page can be linked here.

- **Statistically principled environmental AI**  
  Panel session on the role of statistical principles in environmental AI.

- **INLA: Past, Present, and Future**  
  Workshop in honour of Håvard Rue's 60th birthday. Add slides and tutorials here.

## Seminar and workshop links

- [GLE²N: Glasgow--Edinburgh Extremes Network](https://glen-scotland.github.io/glen/)
- [INLA: Past, Present, and Future](https://dcastrocamilo.github.io/INLA-PastPresentFuture/)
- [EnvEcoStats](https://envecostats.wordpress.com/)

## How to add a talk

Use this template:

```markdown
- **Title of talk**  
  Venue or event, month year.  
  [Slides](#) · [Recording](#) · [Event page](#)
```
